feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Supplier DPR creation We are facing error _Account 65001000 does not exist in chart of accounts YCOA
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While attempting to create a supplier down payment request with a WBS element in the test system, we encountered the following error: "Account 65001000 does not exist in the chart of accounts YCOA."

We did not encounter this error during testing in the custom system. In the custom system, we observed that this GL account (65001000 - Purchase Service) was blocked in the master data, and its implementation status was set to 'In process'—however, these settings were not transferred to the test system.

My question is: What is the relationship between this GL code and the supplier down payment process? We did not configure this setup.

We do not want to use this GL code.

Please let me know if there is any standard SAP configuration related to this.

Thanks & Regards,

DNR

entry.title: Record Time option is not displayed in the Perform Maintenance Jobs app
entry.content: We are facing an issue in the Perform Maintenance Jobs App.A maintenance order has been scheduled, and the maintenance work has been executed successfully. However, when attempting to record the actual time spent on the job, the "Record Time" option is not available on the screen.

entry.title: How to Automatically Assign Default Business Roles to New Users in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and manage users through the Maintain Business Users application.

We have a requirement to automatically assign a set of default business roles whenever a new business user is created. Currently, the role assignment is performed manually, which becomes time-consuming and prone to errors when onboarding a large number of users.

We would like to understand:

  • Is there any standard API available to assign business roles to users in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  • Is there a way to automate business role assignment during or after user creation?
  • Are there any recommended approaches using SAP Cloud Identity Services, SAP Integration Suite, SAP BTP, or other SAP-supported integration options?
  • Has anyone implemented a similar solution in a Public Cloud environment?

Our objective is to ensure that newly created users automatically receive a predefined set of business roles without requiring manual intervention.

Any guidance, best practices, or references to relevant SAP documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Siva Nagi Reddy

entry.title: How to Prevent Duplicate GST Numbers in Customer and Supplier Master Data in SAP S/4HANA Public Clou
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have a business requirement related to GST number validation in Business Partner master data.

The business wants to ensure that the GST Number (Tax Number) maintained in a Customer or Supplier master record is unique across the system.

The expected behavior is as follows:

  • When a user creates or updates a Customer or Supplier master record and enters a GST number, the system should automatically check whether the same GST number already exists in any existing Customer or Supplier master record.
  • If the GST number does not exist, the system should allow the record to be saved.
  • If the GST number already exists, the system should prevent the save operation and display an appropriate error message indicating that a duplicate GST number exists.

We are aware of the Configure Matching and Duplicate Check (SSCUI 100274) functionality. However, our requirement is to enforce a hard validation during save, rather than only identifying potential duplicates.

Could you please advise:

  • Is there any standard functionality available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to enforce uniqueness of GST numbers across Business Partners?
  • Can this requirement be achieved through SSCUI configuration, Business Partner duplicate checks, validation rules, or key user extensibility?
  • Has anyone implemented a similar requirement in a Public Cloud environment?
  • Are there any SAP-recommended best practices for preventing duplicate GST registrations?

Any guidance, documentation references, or implementation experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Siva Nagi Reddy

entry.title: Clarification on Data Source During OPD Preparation Stage
entry.content:
Hi,

During the printout in forms, when the OPD (Output Determination Parameter) is in the Preparation stage, we have observed that changes made to the material description are reflected in the forms.

I would like to understand:

  • Which data is being fetched from the master during the Preparation stage,
  • The reason for this behavior, and
  • The recommended solution to control or avoid such changes being reflected.

Regards,
Jagadish

entry.title: CBC Mandatory SD Organizational Units Due to Baseline Accelerator Scope Selection
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (3SL) implementation.

During project scoping, the Baseline Accelerator was used, which automatically included several SD-related scope items. However, the customer does not have any SD business processes in scope and does not plan to use SD functionality.

As a result, CBC now requires us to create several SD organizational units (Sales Organization, Distribution Channel, Division, Shipping Points, and related assignments) to complete the Organizational Structure activity.

We attempted to remove the related SD scope items, but CBC no longer allows us to deselect them.

Would there be any functional, technical, or maintenance concerns if we simply create these mandatory organizational units to complete CBC, while leaving them otherwise unused?

Additionally, is there a recommended SAP approach for handling scope items that were automatically selected by the Baseline Accelerator but are not required by the customer?

Thank you in advance for your support.

BR,
Evrim

@Melis_Sorgun 

@MerveBayturk

entry.title: how to apply download S4 hana cloud ES all data
entry.content:
we already migrated system from S4hana cloud ES to PE, and ES will stop service in coming month, we want to download all bussiness include master data and documents data from system. how to start this ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: warning message show via API create outbound delivery
entry.content:
Dear colleague,

I have customize one BADI: LE_SHP_DELIVERY_FINAL_CHECK to control when the delivery item quantity is not enough for the stock. It will show one warning message. It is successfully in fiori app testing.

But it is failed when I using API, there is no warning message back to the postman. It just created the outbound delivery. 

Here is my request, is there any solution could support there is one warning message back if I use API to create the outbound delivery?

Many thanks,

Chen

entry.title: Why only China & standard chart of accounts, when my company codes also involve HK/USA?
entry.content: I have activated the company codes for China, Hong Kong, and the USA in the system. Based on my past implementation experience, after activating the corresponding company, its respective chart of accounts should appear. However, currently only the standard and China charts of accounts exist in the system. Why is that? Is there something I haven't done? Or is it that for Hong Kong and the USA, a new chart of accounts simply will not appear?

entry.title: SAP ERP Public Cloud Edition parallel line
entry.content: We are currently in the process of applying for the parallel line. The prerequisites can be found under SAP Help Parallel Line Management | SAP Help Portal: In the workspace of your main line, all activities of the Scope and Organizational Structure phase are completed. My Question: Can scope items still be activated after the parallel line has been created? And can new plants, for example, be added? Both, of course, in the main line and the parallel line. Parallel Line in SAP Central Business Configuration | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Request for BAPI to Enhance Inbound Delivery Validation
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We would like to implement an enhancement in the S/4HANA inbound delivery process and would appreciate your guidance on the appropriate BAPI that can be used to make changes to inbound deliveries.

The business requirement is to prevent duplicate vendor invoice numbers during inbound delivery creation. Specifically, if a user enters a vendor invoice number that has already been maintained for another inbound delivery, the system should validate the entry and trigger an error message, preventing the creation or saving of the duplicate record.

Could you please advise on the suitable BAPI or enhancement framework that can be used to implement this validation?

Thank you in advance for your support.

BR,

Abhishek

entry.title: API PRODHIERPRODS_0001 – POST returns ;Create operations are disabled for association;
entry.content:
We are trying to assign a Product to Product Hierarchy assignment using the Create (POST) operation provided by API PRODHIERPRODS_0001.

According to the API documentation, the POST operation is exposed for the entity and the payload structure follows the sample payload provided in SAP API Business Hub.

However, every POST request returns an error indicating that create operations are disabled for the association _PRODUNIVHIERNORMALNODE.

Request Payload {
"HierarchyNode": "0SNHCISSUE00",
"Product": "TEST_PROD_107",
"HierarchyType": "MD01",
"_ProdUnivHierNormalNode": {
"ProdUnivHierarchy": "MEDIAHIERARCHY",
"HierarchyNode": "0SNHCISSUE00",
"ProdHierarchyValidityEndDate": "9999-12-31",
"ProdHierarchyValidityStartDate": "2026-01-01",
"ParentN

entry.title: Materials not showing up in Maintenance Order Reports
entry.content: Materials not showing up in Maintenance Order Reports

entry.title: Issue with Failed Mail Trace in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
If there is any application to check whether the email sent via SAP has reached its destination or not.

Using the “Monitor Email Transmission” app, it is displaying the status as Sent for both valid and invalid email addresses.

Is there any way to capture invalid or non-existent email addresses?

entry.title: Request for BADI to Enhance Inbound Delivery Validation
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We would like to implement an enhancement in the S/4HANA inbound delivery process and would appreciate your guidance on the appropriate BADI that can be used to make changes to inbound deliveries.

The business requirement is to prevent duplicate vendor invoice numbers during inbound delivery creation. Specifically, if a user enters a vendor invoice number that has already been maintained for another inbound delivery, the system should validate the entry and trigger an error message, preventing the creation or saving of the duplicate record.

Could you please advise on the suitable BADI or enhancement framework that can be used to implement this validation?

Thank you in advance for your support.

BR,

Abhishek

entry.title: Mass update of delivery schedule prices after modify info record price
entry.content: Hi, I have a scheduling agreement in the test environment, number 5500000029 with 5 line items. The validity date is consistent. I changed the price of info record 5300004060. However, when running the job for the program 'Determine and Update Price of Contract Item', the price does not update. In the first run, it updated the price of the second line item, but incorrectly entered '2' (while the info record price was 3.14). Why is it not working? Is this a bug or am I missing a step? Or maybe I'm not using the right program. Is there another one that does this?

entry.title: Supplier Confirmation Dunning is not being sent
entry.content:
Hello,

we are currently facing the problem that the Supplier Confirmation Dunning is not being sent. But all conditions are fulfilled to send it. This happens occasionally.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Material Type DIEN in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

I am configured for material type now, but I can't find material type "DIEN" in system. 
Do I lack of any configure/scope, so I cannot find it? Or material type DIEN has already alternated by material type SERV?

 

Tina

entry.title: Depreciation keys for the assets
entry.content:
Can you create these following Depreciation Keys for the assets:

•    Depreciation key of 5.50% (with a 50% reduction for the first year only)
•    Depreciation key of 1% (with a 50% reduction for the first year only)
•    Depreciation key of 5.56%
•    Depreciation key of 20%

entry.title: AI and Joule Upskilling Guidance for SAP Functional Consultants
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

The topics listed below are related to AI and Joule and are highly relevant to SAP Functional Consultants. Could you please share recommended learning paths, course links, blogs, or documentation that provide step-by-step guidance, configuration details, and structured learning approaches for these areas?

I am particularly interested in learning about -

Generative AI (LLMs, embeddings, and vector databases)

Agentic AI (multi-agent systems, planning, and reasoning)

AI lifecycle management

Machine Learning algorithms (supervised and unsupervised learning)

Neural networks

Natural Language Processing (NLP)

Prompt engineering

AI evaluation frameworks

Any resources, learning roadmaps, hands-on tutorials, or SAP-specific guidance that can help build knowledge and practical expertise in these topics would be greatly appreciated.

Additionally, please consider both SAP Public Cloud and Private Cloud environments when sharing resources and guidance related to the above topics.

Thank you in advance for your support and recommendations.

Best regards,
Ashish
